columns.name: id
columns.description: Internal numeric customer ID from Invoiced; primary key for the customer table.

columns.name: object
columns.description: Discriminator for the record type; always 'customer' for this sheet.

columns.name: number
columns.description: External customer number shown to users, e.g. CUST-0001.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Customer legal or trading name.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Primary billing or accounts payable email for the customer.

columns.name: type
columns.description: Customer type indicating whether the account is a company or an individual person.

columns.name: autopay
columns.description: Indicates if invoices for this customer are automatically charged when due.

columns.name: autopay_delay_days
columns.description: Optional delay in days before autopay is attempted after due date.

columns.name: payment_terms
columns.description: Default payment terms for invoices issued to this customer.

columns.name: attention_to
columns.description: Optional attention line for billing documents (contact or department).

columns.name: address1
columns.description: Primary street address line 1 for the billing address.

columns.name: address2
columns.description: Secondary street address line 2 (suite, unit, etc.).

columns.name: city
columns.description: Billing address city.

columns.name: state
columns.description: Billing address state or province (US two-letter codes in sample).

columns.name: postal_code
columns.description: Billing address postal or ZIP code.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Billing address country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2).

columns.name: language
columns.description: Preferred language code for communications (ISO 639-1).

columns.name: currency
columns.description: Default transaction currency for this customer (ISO 4217 lowercase).

columns.name: phone
columns.description: Primary phone number for the customer.

columns.name: chase
columns.description: Whether automated collections / dunning is enabled for this customer.

columns.name: chasing_cadence
columns.description: Identifier for the dunning cadence applied to this customer, if any.

columns.name: next_chase_step
columns.description: Next scheduled collections step for this customer, if applicable.

columns.name: credit_hold
columns.description: Indicates if the customer is on credit hold (no new credit sales).

columns.name: credit_limit
columns.description: Maximum allowed outstanding balance for this customer, if configured.

columns.name: owner
columns.description: Internal account owner or sales rep responsible for the customer.

columns.name: taxable
columns.description: Whether the customer is generally subject to sales tax.

columns.name: tax_id
columns.description: Customer tax registration number (e.g., VAT, GST, EIN).

columns.name: avalara_entity_use_code
columns.description: Avalara-specific entity use code for tax calculation, if used.

columns.name: avalara_exemption_number
columns.description: Avalara tax exemption certificate number, if applicable.

columns.name: parent_customer
columns.description: Optional reference to another customer ID representing the parent account.

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Free-form internal notes about the customer.

columns.name: sign_up_page
columns.description: Identifier or name of the signup page used when the customer was created.

columns.name: sign_up_url
columns.description: URL of the signup page used to onboard the customer, if applicable.

columns.name: statement_pdf_url
columns.description: Direct URL to download the customer's account statement as a PDF.

columns.name: ach_gateway
columns.description: Identifier of the ACH payment gateway configured for this customer, if any.

columns.name: cc_gateway
columns.description: Identifier of the credit card payment gateway configured for this customer, if any.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the customer record was created in Invoiced.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the customer record was last updated.

columns.name: payment_source_json
columns.description: Serialized JSON array of saved payment sources (cards, bank accounts) for the customer.

columns.name: taxes_json
columns.description: Serialized JSON array of tax configurations or overrides for the customer.
